backend/main.mo: Main actor defining psychometric test and counseling session booking types and functions, user profile management, and authorization integration with MixinAuthorization; includes migration support and CRUD operations for bookings with admin-only access controls.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module defining old and new actor state types (removing contactInquiries) and a run function that transfers psychometricTestBookings, counselingSessionBookings, userProfiles, accessControlState, and nextId from old to new state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting removal of ContactInquiryForm from ContactPage and integration of Tally.so form embed with high confidence for both features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including pages, forms, hooks, layout components, and configuration; documents the warm amber/orange theme, "The Smart Choice" branding, WhatsApp floating button, and Tally form integration replacing ContactInquiryForm.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark modes with neutral grayscale palette (no warm amber/orange colors in CSS variables).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with page title set to "The Smart Choice" and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining routes for Home, Psychometric Test, Counseling, and Contact pages, all wrapped in SiteLayout component.
frontend/src/components/forms/ContactInq: Empty file (contact inquiry form has been removed as part of Tally.so integration).
frontend/src/components/forms/Counseling: Counseling session booking form with validation for name, grade, contact details, preferred date/time/mode (online/in-person), and notes; integrates with backend mutation and displays success/error states via SubmissionStatePanel.
frontend/src/components/forms/Psychometr: Form component for booking psychometric tests with validation, grade selection, contact info, and preferred date/time fields. Displays pricing callout and uses mutation hook to submit bookings, showing success state via SubmissionStatePanel.
frontend/src/components/forms/Submission: Reusable component that displays loading, success, or error states for form submissions with appropriate icons and optional reset button.
frontend/src/components/forms/TallyFormE: Component that embeds Tally forms either via iframe URL or by injecting raw embed code with script execution support.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteLayou: Main site layout with sticky header, responsive navigation, mobile menu, footer with brand info and links, and WhatsApp floating button.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppFloating: Fixed floating action button component linking to WhatsApp Click-to-Chat with phone number 919811575100, prefilled message, and WhatsApp brand green styling with hover effects.
frontend/src/constants/brand.ts: Exports brand name constants: 'The Smart Choice' and its lowercase variant.
frontend/src/hooks/mutations/useSubmitCo: Empty file placeholder for contact inquiry submission mutation hook.
React Query mutation hook for submitting counseling session bookings with parameters like name, grade, contact info, preferred date/time/mode, and notes.
frontend/src/hooks/mutations/useSubmitPs: React Query mutation hook for submitting psychometric test bookings with parameters including name, grade, contact details, and scheduling preferences.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, with admin token initialization support.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient configuration.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page with hero section, contact info cards (email, phone, location), and a Tally form embed for user inquiries. Includes smooth scrolling to the embedded form.
frontend/src/pages/CounselingPage.tsx: 1:1 counseling service page featuring hero section, session details (personal attention, flexible scheduling, online/in-person options), and a booking form. Includes smooth scroll to booking form.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page with hero section promoting educational stream guidance for grades 8-10 students, featuring CTAs for psychometric test and counseling, plus a services overview section.
Psychometric test service page with hero section, pricing display (Rs. 749 intro offer), test benefits explanation, and booking form. Includes smooth scroll to booking form.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and parameter cleanup capabilities.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file that defines custom theme extensions including color schemes using OKLCH color space, typography, container queries, animations, and custom font families with Inter as the primary sans-serif font.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting the replacement of a ContactInquiryForm component with a Tally.so form embed on the Contact Us page, including completed features for removing the old form and integrating Tally, plus pending work to deprecate the backend contact submission endpoint.
